extension.description: Inspired by IntelliJ IDEA's Generate Test feature, brings the same workflow to VS Code, language agnostic, configurable, and designed to work in any project structure including monorepos.
command.generate.title: Generate Test File
command.goToCounterpart.title: Go to Test/Source Counterpart
config.title: Test File Generator
config.sourceRootPattern.description: Path segment identifying the source root (e.g. 'src' or 'src/main'). Matched against the file path, everything before this segment is treated as the project base, enabling monorepo support.
config.testRootPattern.description: Path segment used as the test root. Replaces the sourceRootPattern segment in the resolved test file path (e.g. 'test' or 'src/test').
config.testSuffix.description: Suffix inserted before the file extension in the generated test file name (e.g. '.test' produces 'user.test.ts', '.spec' produces 'user.spec.ts').
config.hardcorePatterns.description: Glob patterns that trigger automatic test file generation when a matching source file is created. Leave empty to disable (e.g. ['**/*.service.ts', '**/*.func.ts']).
config.hardcoreTodoLines.description: Lines written as comments in the auto-generated test file. Use {name} as a placeholder for the test file name.
